LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE JUDGMENT FILED OCTOBER 21, 2014 IS NOW SET ASIDE AND, PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Asset Acceptance, LLC's motion to set aside and vacate judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The judgment filed October 21, 2014 is now set aside and, per plaintiff's request, the case is dismissed without prejudice. Moving party to
prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
